titles.title: I Want to Know You More

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v2 v2 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In the secret, in the quiet place, In the stillness You are there, In the secret, in the quiet hour I wait only for You Cause I want to know You more

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I want to know You I want to hear Your voice I want to know You more I want to touch You I want to see Your face I want to know You more

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I am reaching for the highest goal That I might receive the prize Pressing onward, pushing every hindrance aside Out of my way Cause I want to know You more.
